name: nullable_param
description: Parameter annotated Optional[str] is dereferenced without a guard. Tests annotation-driven nullability.
analysis_note: Param(text, annotation=Nullable) sets env[text]=Nullable via annotation override. Consumer(text, Attribute) fires in return text.strip().
task: clean_input() accepts an Optional[str] but calls .strip() without checking whether text is None. Add a guard so the function handles None safely.
